summary.shape_sentence: Morning grind-up into late-morning HOD, sharp lunch/early-PM liquidation to LOD, then partial afternoon repair that failed to reclaim the open.

goat.note: Standout liquidation leg from roughly 27080 into the 26690 LOD area.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish pivot behavior appeared around the late-morning HOD, the 12:30-12:45 lower-high before breakdown, and the afternoon failed reclaim near 26960-26980.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were reactive, mainly around the 1345 LOD and later higher-low attempts near 26860-26880.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 27110-27150 and 26960-26990 was respected; afternoon repair stalled below the morning high zone.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 26690-26730 held the capitulation low; secondary demand around 26850-26880 was tested during late-session chop.

time_markers.10am_blue: Rotational but stabilizing near 27010 after the open.
time_markers.12pm_red: Still elevated below HOD near 27075-27095, before the downside expansion.
time_markers.2pm_green: Post-flush rebound underway from the 26700 area.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 26926, off LOD but below the open and below morning value.

takeaway: Bearish reversal day with a late-morning high, decisive lunch/early-PM liquidation, and an afternoon bounce that repaired some damage but failed to reclaim the open.
